product: Managed MCP servers is now Public Preview
tagline: Databricks Managed MCP servers is now Public Preview.
what_it_does: Databricks Managed MCP servers is now Public Preview. Managed MCP servers allow your AI agents to securely connect to Databricks resources and external APIs. MCP is an open source standard that connects AI agents to tools, resources, prompts, and other contextual information.
why_it_matters: On Databricks, Unity AI Gateway, the enterprise control plane, governs access and monitors activity across MCP servers and LLM endpoints.

capabilities.title: Connect to MCP servers hosted
capabilities.desc: Connect to MCP servers hosted outside Databricks using managed connections, and register them as Unity Catalog securables to…

capabilities.title: Host your own MCP server
capabilities.desc: Host your own MCP server as a Databricks app.

key_takeaway: Databricks Managed MCP servers is now Public Preview.
